name: Repasses Pendentes
query:
SELECT
    name AS "Repasse:Link/Repasse Cooperados:200",
    contrato AS "Contrato:Link/Contrato 360:220",
    competencia AS "Competência::110",
    valor_total_repasse AS "Valor de Repasse:Currency:160",
    status AS "Status::170"
FROM `tabRepasse Cooperados`
WHERE status NOT IN ('Pago', 'Cancelado')
ORDER BY data_calculo ASC
